task_completion.description: Verify the Manchester branch was created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Location/Branch configuration screen in AttendHRM showing the name 'Manchester', code 'MAN', address '25 Deansgate, Manchester M3 4LQ', phone '0161-555-0142', and email 'manchester@meridian-solutions.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Manchester Standard' work shift was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Shift configuration screen showing a shift named 'Manchester Standard' with an In-Time of 09:00 and Out-Time of 17:30.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Manchester Weekly' week-off pattern was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Shift/Week-off configuration screen showing a pattern named 'Manchester Weekly' where Saturday and Sunday are marked as 'Off' or non-working days for all 5 weeks, and Monday through Friday are working days.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Manchester Staff Leave 2025' policy and its entitlements were configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Leave Entitlements or Leave Settings screens showing a policy named 'Manchester Staff Leave 2025' with Casual Leave set to 12 days, Sick Leave set to 8 days, and Earned Leave set to 15 days. If visible, Earned Leave should have carry-forward enabled, while Casual and Sick should not.

task_completion.description: Verify Reid Ryan and Jessica Owens were transferred to the Manchester branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Employee list or individual employee profile screens showing Reid Ryan (Employee No: 1008) and Jessica Owens (Employee No: 1020) with their Location/Branch updated to 'Manchester'.

task_completion.description: Verify first-day attendance was recorded for the transferred employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Attendance entry screen or register showing records for Reid Ryan and Jessica Owens on the date 03-Mar-2025, with an In-Time of 09:00 and an Out-Time of 17:30.

integrity.description: The agent used the AttendHRM graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the AttendHRM Windows application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than a terminal, script editor, or database management tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQL commands to bypass the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No command prompt, PowerShell, or database client windows (like ISQL or FlameRobin) should be visible executing INSERT or UPDATE statements.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the required information into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the application's input fields being filled out or saved, rather than just displaying the task description in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS). Target employees are Reid Ryan (displayed as Employee No 1008) and Jessica Owens (Employee No 1020). Week-off patterns are created in the same module as Shifts (Roster > Shift). Leave policy verification relies entirely on visual evidence from screenshots, as the underlying database tables for leave policies do not exist in this specific version of the software.
